news.headline: FADEL launches AI music ID tech to prevent costly copyright violations in video content. Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: A recently launched tool by FADEL®, a leader in brand protection and rights management software, assists global brands in avoiding costly copyright violations by automatically detecting licensed music in video content. The tool, introduced in New York on Oct. 22, 2024, aims to streamline the process and reduce legal risks for brands. This advanced feature is designed to identify licensed music, helping companies safeguard against financial penalties and legal consequences. This development marks a significant step in enhancing content protection for global brands, with the tool offering a valuable solution to prevent copyright violations.

news.headline: SkillNet Solutions appoints Prakash Chandra as CTO to lead AI initiatives, strengthen growth strategy in commerce tech.
news.summary: SkillNet Solutions has made significant leadership changes to bolster its growth and innovation in commerce technology. Prakash Chandra has been appointed as Chief Technology Officer (CTO) to spearhead the company's AI/Gen AI efforts, leveraging his extensive 25 years of experience in technology.

news.headline: OrthoLazer raises $7M funding to expand MLS M8 Robotic Laser therapy in US.
news.summary: OrthoLazer, based in Warsaw, Indiana, recently obtained $7 million for their expansion efforts. The company is known for offering MLS M8 Robotic Laser therapy, the only provider in the US specializing in orthopedic pain and inflammation treatment. This funding marks the closure of their successful $7 million Series A round.

news.headline: Charter Oak State College offers Virtual Open House for online Graduate and Undergraduate degrees in December via Zoom.
news.summary: Charter Oak State College, an online public college in Connecticut, will be hosting virtual Open House events in December via Zoom to showcase all of their online Graduate and Undergraduate degree programs. The events will take place on various dates throughout the month. This initiative aims to provide prospective students with the opportunity to learn about the college's offerings and ask any questions they may have. Interested individuals can register for the Open House events on the college's website. This is a great chance for individuals to explore the diverse educational opportunities available at Charter Oak State College.

news.headline: Avalanche launches Visa crypto payment card supporting USDC and AVAX, initially in Latin America and Caribbean, with plans to expand globally. Card not linked to bank account, offers self-custody wallet for secure access to funds.
news.summary: Avalanche (AVAX) has introduced the Avalanche Card, a crypto payment solution for making purchases at any Visa-accepting location with digital assets. This card supports USDC and AVAX, allowing users to spend crypto like traditional currency. Available in physical and virtual forms, the card debuted in Latin America and the Caribbean, with expansion plans. It operates independently of traditional banking, preserving the user's credit score. Users receive a secure self-custody wallet for instant fund access and security features like spending alerts and card freezing. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ACB's Monica Martin nominated for 2 Women in Tech Global Awards - Digital Transformation and Lifetime Achievement.
news.summary: Monica Martin, the Vice President of Innovation at the Advertising Checking Bureau, Inc. (ACB), has recently been nominated for two prestigious awards by WomenTech Network. The nominations include the Digital Transformation of the Year Award and the Lifetime Achievement Award. The exciting news was announced in New York on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Graywind to release Smart Top Down Bottom Up Shades in Oct 2024, aiming for better lighting, privacy, energy efficiency.
news.summary: A leading company in smart window treatments, Graywind, is gearing up to launch a fresh line of products in mid-October 2024. The soon-to-be-released Smart Top Down Bottom Up Shades are designed to provide homeowners with enhanced control over lighting, privacy, and energy efficiency. This release is anticipated to take place in Santa Clara.

news.headline: University of Pennsylvania Press partners with MEI Global for content distribution deals, enhancing intellectual reach. Philadephia, Oct 22, 2024.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on October 22, 2024, the University of Pennsylvania Press (Penn Press) revealed their decision to collaborate with content licensing agency MEI Global. The aim of this partnership is to secure distribution agreements that will facilitate the dissemination of Penn Press' wealth of knowledge, supporting scholarly inquiry. This strategic move underscores Penn Press' commitment to broadening their reach and impact in the academic community.

news.headline: Jim Schlaman joins Woolpert to direct water and energy utilities, expanding services across the U.S. - Dayton, Ohio, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: In an effort to bolster its water and energy utility services across the United States, Woolpert has brought on Jim Schlaman as the Market Director for Water and Energy Utilities. The appointment, announced in Dayton, Ohio on October 22, 2024, aims to enhance key projects and foster expansion within the sector. Schlaman will be instrumental in cultivating relationships with clients and tapping into new markets to drive growth. His role will focus on supporting initiatives to maximize the company's presence in the industry, with a particular emphasis on scaling operations to reach a wider audience.

news.headline: Fairview Microwave launches new gooseneck omni antennas for enhanced signals, easy to adjust, launched on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: Fairview Microwave, based in Irvine, California, revealed on October 22, 2024, that they are introducing a new line of flexible antennas. As a part of Infinite Electronics, the company specializes in RF, microwave, and millimeter-wave products. The antennas are designed for optimal reception and are easy to adjust. This release showcases Fairview Microwave's commitment to innovation and meeting the demands of the market.

news.headline: Almond FinTech wraps up 2024 with momentum, empowering financial institutions with cross-border transactions.
news.summary: In Boston on October 22, 2024, the B2B FinTech technology provider Almond FinTech concluded the year with a strong performance. Almond FinTech is dedicated to enabling financial institutions worldwide to conduct quick, cost-effective, and clear cross-border transactions. This news highlights the successful closure of the year 2024 for Almond FinTech, as they maintain their commitment to facilitating seamless financial operations for their clients.

news.headline: DrumWave grows leadership, relocates HQ to iconic Silicon Valley site with new hires, boosting global talent.
news.summary: In a bid to enhance its global workforce, Silicon Valley innovator DrumWave has recently announced significant additions to its team. The company, based in Mountain View, California, welcomed two new top-level executives, reinforcing its key positions in technology, product development, and operations. This strategic move comes as part of DrumWave's expansion plans and its efforts to stay at the forefront of industry trends. The company has relocated to the renowned former headquarters of General Magic at 2465, symbolizing its commitment to growth and innovation in the tech sector.

news.headline: CloudControlMedia GM Christopher Roberts to speak at AMA event in Rochester on Oct. 22, 2024, in collaboration with Abilene Christian University's VP Steven Rutt.
news.summary: Christopher N. Roberts, General Manager of CloudControlMedia, has been chosen to speak at the upcoming 2024 AMA Symposium for the Marketing of Abilene Christian University. Roberts will be joining Vice President Steven Rutt to present at the conference in Rochester, N.Y. on Oct. 22, 2024. This event will provide valuable insights for marketing professionals and will feature various speakers discussing innovative strategies. Don’t miss this opportunity to learn from industry experts.

news.headline: Master S.H. Yu Martial Arts in Oak Park, IL celebrates 30 years of operation, offering lessons in various martial arts.
news.summary: Master S.H. Yu Martial Arts, located in Oak Park, IL, is commemorating its 30th year since establishment. This martial arts dojhang offers instruction in various martial arts forms. Known for its expertise and commitment, the institution stands out as a prominent establishment in the field.

news.headline: Moontide Agency partners with LA Kings for 2024-2025 NHL season to boost ticket sales, merchandise growth, and fan engagement.
news.summary: In the upcoming 2024-2025 NHL season, Moontide Agency has entered into a partnership with the LA Kings. Serving as the team's media planning and buying collaborator, Moontide aims to bolster ticket sales, merchandise expansion, and fan interaction. By utilizing data-informed digital strategies, the agency will work towards enhancing the team's presence and revenue streams.

news.headline: TCS World Travel introduces 2026 private jet journeys to 4 global destinations, including Mediterranean. Leading operator.
news.summary: A prominent private jet expedition company has launched four exclusive trips to various global destinations, including a new journey through the Mediterranean. TCS World Travel, known for its high accolades in the industry, announced this exciting development from Seattle on October 22, 2024. These carefully curated trips promise exceptional experiences for travelers seeking luxury and adventure, consolidating the company's position as a top player in the world of private jet expeditions.

news.headline: Introducing Power1: all-in-one device management solution with innovative charging tech and modular design for easy iPhone customization - reinventing mobile charging and storage.
news.summary: Power1, a cutting-edge device management solution, revolutionizes the market with its integration of innovative charging technology and versatile modular design. With advanced on-device reverse charging and interchangeable modules, Power1 offers seamless power solutions and customization for iPhone users. This durable product offers a new approach to device management, ensuring efficiency and convenience.

news.headline: GOLO donates 100,000 meals for Hurricane Helene recovery in NC, GA, FL, through Feeding America. Commitment to local communities evident.
news.summary: The health and wellness solutions company, GOLO, based in Newark, Delaware, reaffirmed its dedication to aiding local communities by contributing to Feeding America's network of partner food banks. GOLO donated 100,000 nutritious items as part of this initiative on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: My Storage Group boosts revenue with Smart Units, up to $250 increase in customer lifetime value, 90% customer advocacy.
news.summary: A recently conducted case study shows that My Storage Group, a self-storage operator, has seen a significant increase in customer lifetime value, with some customers showing up to a $250 boost. This improvement was coupled with a high level of customer advocacy, as 9 out of 10 customers were found to endorse the service. My Storage Group operates a total of 11 facilities located in Utah, Idaho, Nevada, and Arizona. Their success was particularly notable in enhancing tenant satisfaction and loyalty.

news.headline: Dr. Kingsley R. Chin, CEO of KIC Ventures, is the only Black CEO in a private equity healthtech firm specializing in spine surgery technologies.
news.summary: Dr. Kingsley R. Chin, the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of KIC Ventures, stands out as the sole Black CEO overseeing a worldwide private equity healthtech investment company concentrating on spine surgery innovations. Hailing from Jamaica, Dr. Chin is a pioneer in healthtech, driving progress in outpatient spine surgery.

news.headline: ClientCircle reveals findings from 10-year insurance customer sentiment study, highlighting focus on communication and service.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted by ClientCircle, a prominent insurance marketing automation platform based in the U.S., it was found that insurance consumers prioritize establishing a strong connection based on effective communication and quality service. The analysis, spanning over a decade, sheds light on the preferences of insurance customers. This valuable insight gathered by ClientCircle underlines the significance of fostering lasting relationships with clients in the insurance industry.

news.headline: BRICS alliance set for enhanced role at Kazan summit in Russia, with growing membership. Importance rising among Global South nations for development and equity.
news.summary: In Kazan, Russia, on October 22, 2024, countries from the Global South are showing growing interest in the BRICS alliance as a vital player in global economic advancement and the promotion of a fairer, more equitable global order. This year signals a new phase in this trend, with a significant emphasis on...

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates INSI, LBPH, NBR for potential violations impacting shareholder rights.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in New York, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, initiated investigations into several companies for possible breaches of fiduciary duties or violations of federal securities laws. This investigation includes the Insight Select Income Fund trading on the NYSE. The firm aims to ensure shareholder interests and uphold legal standards in these cases.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating RVNC, ARC, BTTR for potential violations of federal securities laws.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, announced that it is looking into potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities by various companies. One of the firms under investigation is Revance Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ...). The investigation revolves around suspicions of improper conduct that may have negatively impacted shareholders. Halper Sadeh LLC's scrutiny aims to ensure accountability and protection of shareholder interests amid these allegations.

news.headline: Former Abercrombie CEO, Mike Jeffries, along with two others, arrested in a federal sex trafficking case.
news.summary: Three individuals, including Mr. Jeffries, have been apprehended in relation to a federal inquiry into sex trafficking and interstate prostitution.

news.headline: Expectations for 2024 have been raised significantly.
Arm CEO talks about Intel, chips, AI, and potential US listing in an interview with Bloomberg.
Crypto CEO loses $450K to trusted friend via proxmity breach, accessing his WiFi network.
news.summary: A new trend known as a "proximity breach" is on the rise, involving individuals exploiting someone they are close to in order to steal money. In this particular incident, the theft occurred through a WiFi network. This form of cybercrime highlights the increasing vulnerability of individuals to attacks from trusted sources. Stay vigilant and protect your personal information to avoid falling victim to such crimes.

news.headline: Annual subscription offers market intelligence on gift/incentive cards in 40 countries, from 2011-2020, for targeting strategies & trends - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included a subscription for the Gift Card and Incentive Cards Market Intelligence Service, offering comprehensive insights for 40 countries. The subscription encompasses market size and forecasts from 2011 to 2020, targeting strategies, analysis of business and consumer trends, consumer attitudes and behaviors, as well as market innovations. This service delves into detailed analysis of the gift and incentive card sectors, providing in-depth information on strategies and innovations. It offers valuable insights for businesses operating in these markets.

news.headline: FirstClose introduces real-time debt consolidation feature to FirstClose Equity, boosting conversions by over 10% in early trials.
news.summary: A new prospect-facing engagement tool has shown promising results in early trials, with a conversion rate increase of over 10%. FirstClose™, Inc., a prominent fintech company based in Austin, Texas, unveiled the tool on October 22, 2024. Specializing in data and workflow solutions for mortgage and home equity lenders across the country, FirstClose™ aims to improve efficiency and effectiveness in the industry. The tool's performance suggests a positive impact on conversion rates, indicating its potential to enhance customer engagement and drive business growth.

news.headline: Vistria Group & Ethos Real Estate convert 700 market-rate units to affordable housing in San Mateo. Landmark deal in CA.
news.summary: A significant agreement has been reached in San Mateo, California on October 22, 2024, marking one of the largest conversions from market-rate to affordable housing in the state. The Vistria Group and Ethos Real Estate are at the forefront of this deal, aiming to address the pressing issue of affordable housing in costly regions. This development marks a crucial step towards improving housing accessibility, with a potentially substantial impact on the community.

news.headline: Ovizio Imaging Systems SA acquisition complete, deal closed successfully.
Celestial AI acquires Rockley Photonics' IP, adding to their total of 200+ patents for silicon photonics, boosting their Photonic Fabric™ strength.
news.summary: A company based in Santa Clara, California, known as Celestial AI™, specializing in Photonic Fabric™, has revealed the acquisition of silicon photonics intellectual property previously owned by Rockley Photonics (Rockley™). This includes various patents that are either active worldwide or still in the process of being approved. The collaboration between Celestial AI and the acquired Rockley IP has substantially strengthened their combined intellectual property assets, now exceeding 200 patents on a global scale. This move bolsters their position in the area of silicon photonics, particularly in optical compute interconnect technologies.

news.headline: BTC on verge of hitting $70,000, boosted by rising open interest and stable funding rates, suggesting robust market activity and regulatory changes.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has climbed to nearly $70,000, driven by rising open interest and stable funding rates. These factors suggest a high level of market involvement and the possibility of upcoming regulatory changes.

news.headline: Earth Alive Clean Technologies files Notice of Intention under the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act, appoints Raymond Chabot Inc. as trustee, legal counsel Davies Ward Phillips & Vineberg LLP; announcement made on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: In Montréal on October 22, 2024, Earth Alive Clean Technologies Inc. (TSXV: EAC) released news stating their filing of a Notice of Intention to Make a Proposal under the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act (Canada). This action appoints Raymond Chabot Inc. as the proposal trustee for the Company, with legal representation provided by Davies Ward Phillips & Vineberg LLP. The details were disclosed without the specific reasons for the proposal.

news.headline: Sherwin-Williams Q3: Revenue $6.16B, EPS $3.37, Gross Profit $3.028B, Paint Store sales up but weak consumer demand affects sales.
news.summary: Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) saw a decline in shares following lower-than-expected third-quarter results. Quarterly revenue increased by 0.7% to $6.16 billion, falling short of the projected $6.20 billion. The rise in revenue was supported by increased sales in the Paint Stores and acquisition impact in 2023, partially offset by decreased sales in the Consumer Brands and Performance Coatings Groups. Net sales in Paint Stores Group grew by 3.2%, attributed to growth in sales volume and higher selling prices. Quarterly gross profit rose to $3.028 billion from $2.92 billion the previous year, with a gross margin increase to 49.1% from 47.7%. Adjusted earnings per share were reported at $3.37, below the expected $3.54. The company distributed $1.97 billion to shareholders through dividends and repurchases of 4.4 million shares.

news.headline: Race Rock makes key leadership appointments and promotions to drive growth and excellence. Paul Radice is now Vice President & General Manager of Highway Safety Corp. & Ohio Galvanizing.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Race Rock disclosed significant leadership changes in a move to enhance operational performance and facilitate growth across their various ventures. As part of these developments, Paul Radice has been appointed as Vice President & General Manager for Highway Safety Corp. and Ohio Galvanizing. This strategic promotion is effective immediately and showcases Race Rock's dedication to operational excellence and expansion. Paul Radice's new role will involve overseeing operations and management of these key entities within the company.

news.headline: Essential Utilities wins award for board diversity from The Forum of Executive Women for the sixth time, one of 46 companies recognized.
news.summary: In Bryn Mawr, Pennsylvania, Essential Utilities (NYSE: WTRG) has received recognition as a Champion of Board Diversity by The Forum of Executive Women for the sixth time since 2017. This prestigious honor is bestowed upon companies that are leading the charge for gender equity. Among 46 companies in the Greater Philadelphia area, Essential stands out for its commitment to diversity with at least 30 percent of their boards being comprised of women. The Forum of Executive Women assesses the top 100 public companies in the region annually, highlighting those who are Champions of Board Diversity.

news.headline: Freeform secures investments from NVIDIA's NVentures & AE Ventures to bring AI to metal 3D printing, enabling unprecedented speed & precision.
news.summary: Major investment has been made in AI and supercomputing for metal additive manufacturing by Freeform, a pioneering company in AI-driven metal 3D printing established by ex-SpaceX engineers. The investment aims to enhance speed and precision in the process. The development was announced on Oct 22, 2024, in Hawthorne, California.

news.headline: Ballistic Ventures appoints Gregory Crabb as CISO-in-Residence, renowned leader in cybersecurity.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 22, 2024, Ballistic Ventures, a venture capital firm focusing solely on supporting and nurturing cybersecurity entrepreneurs and innovations, revealed Gregory Crabb as their new CISO-in-Residence. Crabb, a highly regarded figure in the industry, will be bringing his expertise to the firm's initiatives.

news.headline: Sun Life U.S. expands Healthcare Professional long-term disability coverage for healthcare providers to recruit and retain talent.
news.summary: In Wellesley, Massachusetts on October 22, 2024, Sun Life U.S. announced an expansion of its Healthcare Professional long-term disability (LTD) coverage. The specialized coverage is tailored to support healthcare providers in case they are unable to work because of illness or injury. This expansion aims to provide increased support to healthcare professionals facing such circumstances.

news.headline: 10% of nominal value sold at auction on October 18 was re-issued for RIKB 27 0415 & RIKS 37 0115 at accepted bids.
news.summary: In accordance with the sixth paragraph of the General Terms of Auction for Treasury bonds, the Government Debt Management made available 10% of the nominal value during the auction held on October 18. These bonds were offered at the price of the winning bids.

news.headline: "Harry Potter and the Cursed Child debuts shorter version on Broadway, now under 3 hours after producers' announcement."
news.summary: Today, on October 22, 2024, the producers of the play "Harry Potter and the Cursed Child" - Sonia Friedman Productions, Colin Callender, and Harry Potter Theatrical Productions - revealed a new shortened version of the play. With a running time of less than three hours, this fresh rendition aims to captivate audiences with its faster pace.

news.headline: Síminn hf. reports Q3 2024 results: Revenue up 15% to $100M, net profit doubles to $20M.
Sclera partners with TD SYNNEX in North America to expand Optima platform, offering cost-saving asset management solutions.
news.summary: Sclera has launched its AI-driven Asset Intelligence platform, Optima, which can now be accessed via TD SYNNEX. This platform is designed to enhance asset management by simplifying onboarding, maintenance, and disposal procedures. As a result, businesses can achieve notable cost reductions and enhance operational efficiency. The launch took place in Chicago on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Dynabook Americas appoints Mike Marusic as new President; pro-grade laptops. Marusic is also CEO of Sharp Imaging.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on October 22, 2024, Dynabook Americas, Inc. introduced Mike Marusic, the current president and CEO of Sharp Imaging and Information Company of America, as their newest addition. Dynabook Americas is renowned for producing durable, high-quality laptops designed for professional use.

news.headline: Nordic Data Center Colocation Market valued at $844M in 2023, projected to reach $1.61B by 2029, with 11.42% CAGR. New players making strides.
news.summary: In Dublin, the Nordic Data Center Colocation Market is witnessing growth, with a value of USD 844 million in 2023. The market is projected to reach USD 1.61 billion by 2029, displaying a CAGR of 11.42%. The expansion of facilities in this sector is noteworthy, fueled by the region's ample, cost-effective renewable energy sources and natural cooling abilities.

news.headline: IDS, under Arlington Capital Partners, appoints Tammer Olibah as President and CEO, with co-founder Truhe on the Board of Directors.
news.summary: In Washington, leading provider of software and technology support for federal clients, Integrated Data Services (IDS), has named Tammer Olibah as the new President and CEO. Co-founder and ex-CEO James Truhe will continue serving on the Board of Directors and collaborate with the leadership team as the company transitions to its next phase. IDS, backed by Arlington Capital Partners, specializes in delivering services to federal customers.

news.headline: Hear from Morgan Stanley's Mike Wilson on valuations and election risk.
Anne Sulling's term in the Enefit Green Supervisory Board ended on October 21 and 22, 2024, leading to changes.
news.summary: Anne Sulling, an independent member of the Supervisory Board at Enefit Green and a member of the Audit Committee, has reached the end of her three-year term on October 21 and 22, 2024, respectively.
